title: athyrium ammifolium
intro: Athyrium ammifolium, also known as the Lady Fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Athyriaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium ammifolium include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
